article.title: 5 gardening tips you can try right in Search

harvestedTerms.summary: A Google promotional piece showing gardening use-cases for Search AI features (AI Mode, Canvas, Search Live, Shopping filters). Essentially a marketing listicle for Google Search capabilities dressed as gardening tips. No substantive AI terminology introduced.

Paywalled Stratechery earnings analysis covering Microsoft's agentic business model and Apple's AI-related hardware constraints. Only the headline and sub-headline are visible; no substantive body content is accessible.

article.title: Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber

harvestedTerms.summary: OpenAI announces GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber with a tiered 'Trusted Access for Cyber' (TAC) framework, differentiating model access levels for defensive security workflows, penetration testing, and critical infrastructure protection. The article details how identity-verified access unlocks progressively more permissive cybersecurity capabilities, and introduces Codex Security for open-source defenders.

A brief quote/commentary post about WebRTC's audio packet-dropping behavior causing problems for voice AI prompts — noting that WebRTC's latency-first design conflicts with LLM use cases where accuracy matters more than speed.

OpenAI announces GPT-5.4, a frontier model combining reasoning, coding, and agentic capabilities with native computer-use, 1M token context, tool search, and improvements in knowledge work, spreadsheets, and presentations. Benchmarks cited include GDPval, OSWorld-Verified, SWE-Bench Pro, and Toolathlon.

article.title: Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX

harvestedTerms.summary: Anthropic announces a compute partnership with SpaceX's Colossus 1 data center (300MW, 220,000+ NVIDIA GPUs), alongside usage limit increases for Claude Code and the Claude API. The article also recaps other major compute deals with Amazon, Google/Broadcom, Microsoft/NVIDIA, and Fluidstack, and mentions interest in orbital AI compute capacity and international data residency expansion.
